edge_legend.TOP_EDGE: Positive PP edge (+1.5+) or strong avg vs weak pitching (high rank).
edge_legend.OK_EDGE: PP edge on board or team leader vs soft/average pitching.
edge_legend.TOP_UNDER: PP edge -2+ vs elite pitching, or historically fades vs elite D.
edge_legend.OK_UNDER: Negative PP edge vs elite pitching or bottom-3 producer vs elite D — lean UNDER.
edge_legend.AVOID: Negative PP edge without elite matchup — skip OVER.
